data.title: China sanctions 20 U.S. defense contractors and 10 executives due to $10 billion arms sale to Taiwan. Notable companies include Northrop Grumman, Boeing, Anduril.
data.description: In response to a $10 billion arms sale to Taiwan, China imposed sanctions on 20 U.S. defense contractors and 10 industry executives. Among those targeted were Anduril and its founder Palmer Lucky. The sanctioned companies include Northrop Grumman and Boeing.

data.title: Tesla intensifies robotaxi push before Musk's deadline in 5 days to eliminate safety monitors, per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: With only five days left, the pressure is on Elon Musk to deliver on his commitment to eliminate robotaxi safety monitors. The countdown is on for Tesla as they intensify their promotion of the robotaxi concept in the lead-up to Musk's imminent deadline. This development has caught the attention of investors and industry watchers alike. Stay tuned for updates on this evolving situation.

data.title: America250 organizes NYE celebration in Times Square to mark America turning 250, featuring surprise post-midnight event.
data.description: In the capital city of Washington, a celebration is set to take place as America reaches its 250th year milestone. The nonpartisan organization, America250, tasked by Congress to oversee the festivities honoring the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, has teamed up with One Times Square and the Times Square Alliance. They have revealed plans for an additional surprise event after midnight on New Year's Eve to kick off the Semiquincentennial year. This special moment is designed to commemorate the beginning of the historic year ahead.

data.title: Seoul introduces Stepping Stone Income to tackle jobless growth in the AI era, SIFSI 2025 reports positive outcomes.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, the SIFSI 2025 initiative has revealed encouraging outcomes for the Seoul Stepping Stone Income program. The report showcases its effectiveness, policy insights, and potential enhancements.

data.title: JETRO to host 31 Japanese startups at CES 2026, with thrice daily pitch events. Japan Pavilion at Venetian Expo.
data.description: Las Vegas-- The Japan External Trade Organization (JETRO) will be sponsoring the Japan Pavilion at CES 2026 in Las Vegas from January 6th to 9th. This year, JETRO is bringing 31 Japanese startups to showcase at CES, specifically in the startup arena Eureka Park. The Japan Pavilion will be situated at the Venetian Campus Venetian Expo 1F Hall G Booth #62801. In addition, within the Japan Pavilion, JETRO will establish a special event stage for hosting various presentations.

data.title: Onigilly Japanese Kitchen ends 2025 with record sales growth and expands franchise pipeline, celebrates new openings and menu innovation.
data.description: In San Francisco, Onigilly Japanese Kitchen, a fast-casual brand known for its traditional onigiri rice balls, is marking the end of 2025 with new store openings, menu enhancements, and advancements in franchise expansion. The company is experiencing growth as it moves into the new year.

data.title: Investors in Avantor, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky before Dec 29, 2025 regarding class action securities lawsuit (NYSE: AVTR).
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action securities lawsuit involving Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR). The lawsuit aims to assist investors in recovering losses. Specifically, it targets Avantor, Inc. shareholders who...

data.title: Crunch Fitness launches "Crunch: Feel More" campaign using "This Is How We Do It" track to showcase gym experience.
data.description: In New York on December 26, 2025, Crunch Fitness launched a new marketing campaign that utilizes the popular song "This Is How We Do It," along with a renowned music video director, to emphasize the positive impact of exercising at their facilities. This strategy aims to tap into nostalgia and showcase the transformative effects on both physical and emotional well-being that working out at Crunch can provide. This creative approach combines iconic elements to attract customers, highlighting the brand's commitment to offering high-value fitness experiences.

data.title: Digital Ally (NASDAQ: DGLY) to report quarterly earnings on Monday, with estimated EPS of $-2.01. Investors anticipate positive guidance.
data.description: Digital Ally (NASDAQ: DGLY) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Monday, December 29, 2025. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$2.01 for the company. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, with hopes of Digital Ally exceeding these expectations and providing optimistic guidance for the future.

data.title: Cadiz Inc. declares quarterly dividend for Q4 2025 on Series A preferred stock; 8.875% rate announced.
data.description: Today, in Los Angeles, Cadiz, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDZI) (NASDAQ: CDZIP), a California-based water solutions company, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend for its 8.875% Series A Cumulative Perpetual. The dividend amount was not disclosed in the news article.

data.title: Lovesac Company celebrates Couchmas from Dec 25 to Jan 1 with giveaways; promotes comfort and connection. Nasdaq: LOVE.
data.description: Lovesac is commemorating comfort, connection, and unapologetic relaxation this Couchmas by offering giveaways to deserving individuals throughout the week. The Lovesac Company, listed on Nasdaq as LOVE, is based in Stamford, Conn. This initiative aims to spread joy during the holiday season and highlight the importance of relaxation and togetherness.

data.title: CR Fitness Holdings LLC, the top Crunch Fitness franchisee, organizes "Get It Back Week" from Dec. 24-31 in Tampa, FL to help members reclaim fitness goals.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, as of December 26, 2025, CR Fitness Holdings LLC, the top franchisee of Crunch Fitness, is currently holding "Get It Back Week," a program scheduled from December 24th to 31st. This week-long initiative aims to assist members in prioritizing self-care and reclaiming their well-being.

data.title: China's biotech sector has grown from follower to global force, shifting from reliance on Western companies.
data.description: As of December 26, 2025, it has been observed that China has made significant progress in the field of biotechnology over the last ten years. Initially known as a follower in this industry, China has transformed into a major global innovator. In the earlier days, the country depended on Western pharmaceutical firms for cutting-edge treatments. However, it is now emphasizing the development of its indigenous biotech sector. This shift in approach indicates China's growing influence and autonomy in the biotechnology landscape.

data.title: NYSE gives daily pre-market update from Trading Floor. Get insights before trading begins. Ashley Mastronardi delivers update.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update through PRNewswire. The update offers insights from the NYSE Trading Floor to help investors make informed decisions before the trading day commences. Ashley Mastronardi is the individual responsible for delivering the pre-market update. Investors are encouraged to review today's NYSE Pre-market update for valuable market information.

data.title: MiniMoves Inc. excels in small state-to-state moves, leading in U.S. and international relocations with innovation.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, in Hillside, Illinois, MiniMoves Inc., the leading full-service moving company in the nation specializing in small state-to-state household goods shipments, revealed its ongoing commitment to leadership and innovation in the small-move industry, catering to both domestic and international customers. This company is known for its unique focus on handling smaller shipments and ensuring top-notch service for clients relocating across states and globally.

data.title: New report on South Africa's electricity generation industry featuring Eskom, Avon, Dedisa, and more. Focus on infrastructure, sources, renewable energy & tariffs. Updates on energy reforms and plans for the future.
data.description: A recent report titled "The Generation of Electricity in South Africa 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's selection. This comprehensive report delves into various aspects of electricity generation in South Africa, encompassing details on electricity infrastructure, grid capacity, energy sources, renewable energy generation, generation performance, energy security risks, and tariffs. The report covers information on energy resource reforms, the integrated resource plan, and ongoing developments in the energy sector within the country. It offers a detailed analysis of the current scenario and projections for the year 2025.

data.title: Nexxen releases Supplemental Proxy Statement for 2025 AGM on Dec 30. New updates for global advertising technology platform.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Nexxen International Ltd. (NASDAQ: NEXN) disclosed that it has released a Supplemental Proxy Statement for its upcoming 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders set for December 30, 2025. The company is recognized as a worldwide advertising technology platform proficient in data and advanced TV services. The AGM is a crucial event for shareholders to partake in important decisions regarding the company's operations.
